stem: A digital marketing study surveys 100 users shown the ad and observes 32 positive outcomes out of 100 (32.0%). Estimate the true click-through rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.32. Wilson 95% CI: [0.2367, 0.4166]. Point estimate: 0.3267.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
